topic_context.topic_summary: This topic contains rules that adjust thermostat settings based on the user's location, optimizing heating and cooling when the user is away or approaching home to enhance energy efficiency.

rows.if_then_rule: IF You enter an area from iOS Location THEN Set temperature range using Nest Thermostat.
IF You exit an area from Location THEN turn your heating off using Honeywell evohome.
IF You exit an area from Location THEN lower temperature using Honeywell Single-zone Thermostat.
IF You enter an area from iOS Location THEN set the temperature using Nest Thermostat.
IF You exit an area from Location THEN turn down the Nest using Nest Thermostat.
IF You enter an area from BMW Labs THEN set room temperature using Nefit Easy.
IF You exit an area from Location THEN switch to eco mode using Wiser Smart.
IF You enter an area from BMW Labs THEN set temperature using Nest Thermostat.
IF You exit an area from Location THEN pause using ThermoSmart.
IF You exit an area from Location THEN pause your ThermoSmart.
IF You exit an area from Location THEN set thermostat temperature using Heatmiser.
IF You exit an area from Location THEN turn off your thermostat using Hive Active Heating.
IF You exit an area from Location THEN turn off your heater using WeMo Heater.
IF You exit an area from Location THEN set thermostat to schedule using Hive Active Heating.
IF Vehicle leaves a place from Zubie THEN adjust temperature using Nest Thermostat.
IF You enter an area from Location THEN turn up the heat using WeMo Heater.

IF You exit an area from Location THEN set temperature range using Nest Thermostat.

IF You enter an area from Location THEN set temperature using ThermoSmart.
IF You exit an area from Location THEN set new mode using Caleo.

IF You exit an area from iOS Location THEN cool down the house using Nefit Easy.

IF You enter an area from Location THEN cool your home for 1 hour using Honeywell Total Connect Comfort.
IF You enter an area from Location THEN set a zone temperature using Honeywell Single-zone Thermostat.
IF You exit an area from Location THEN pause using ThermoSmart.
IF You enter an area from Location THEN turn on heating using Nest Thermostat.
IF You enter an area from Location THEN set thermostat to a specific temperature using Nest Thermostat.
IF You exit an area from Location THEN change temperature using Nest Thermostat.
IF You enter an area from Location THEN turn on heating using Nest Thermostat.
IF You exit a SIGNUL beacon zone from SIGNUL Beacon THEN set temperature using Nest Thermostat.

IF Ignition turned off in area from Automatic Classic THEN set thermostat when home using Nest Thermostat.
IF You enter an area from iOS Location THEN set temperature using Nest Thermostat.
IF Ignition turned off in area from Automatic Classic THEN turn Nest thermostat up when home.
IF You exit an area from Location THEN warm up the living room using Honeywell evohome.
IF You exit an area from Location THEN pause the ThermoSmart.
IF You exit an area from Location THEN turn off your heater using WeMo Heater.
IF Vehicle leaves a place from Zubie THEN adjust temperature using Nest Thermostat.
IF Vehicle arrives at a place from Zubie THEN adjust temperature using Nest Thermostat.
IF You exit an area from Location THEN change the temperature using Greenwave Systems.
